landing.badge: Free · No login · Runs in browser
landing.headline:
Edit JSON
without friction.
landing.subheadline: Tree view, table view, Monaco editor, and diff comparison — all local, all fast. Your data never leaves the browser.
landing.localProcessing: All processing happens locally. Zero telemetry. Open tab and go.
landing.noDataSent: No data is sent to any server.

tree.title: Tree editor
tree.description: Navigate nested JSON visually. Click any value to edit in place.

table.title: Table view
table.description: Arrays of objects unfold into editable spreadsheet-style tables.

monaco.title: Monaco editor
monaco.description: Full syntax highlighting, validation, format, and minify.

diff.title: JSON diff
diff.description: See every change highlighted side by side.

export.title: Export anywhere
export.description: JSON, plain text, JavaScript object, or PHP array.

editor.confirmClear: Clear all data? This cannot be undone.
editor.invalidJsonFile: Invalid JSON file. Please check the format.
editor.treeEditorHint: Click any value to edit · arrays open as table
editor.noDataHint: Upload a file or paste JSON to get started
editor.shortcutHint: Ctrl+F: Format · Ctrl+Shift+M: Minify · Ctrl+Shift+C: Copy
editor.jsonDiffHint: Paste two JSON documents to see differences highlighted
